summary: Verified Repair Rules UI simplification. All features working correctly: 'If answer is' dropdown shows grouped Dent/Scratch options from Q&A, 'Then charge' dropdown shows Repair/Labor/Both/Inspect Further, backend API returns sub_options_1 and sub_options_2, auto-repair detection in LiveProgressModal shows 40 items with correct pricing.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing inspection Hiba. Mol (HR29AH5542)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Repair Rules UI simplification verified. RuleConditionRow component correctly shows grouped answer options from sub_options_1 (Dent: 1-2, 3-4, 4+, No Dents) and sub_options_2 (Scratch: 1-2, 3-4, 4+, No Scratch). ACTION_TYPES updated to Repair/Labor/Both/Inspect Further. Backend API /api/repair-rules/available-questions returns sub_options correctly. LiveProgressModal Repairs tab shows 40 auto-detected items with correct pricing (Part cost only for 'repair' action).

verified_features: Repair Rules UI: 'If answer is' dropdown shows exact answer options from Q&A page
Repair Rules UI: Dent options (1-2, 3-4, 4+, No Dents) and Scratch options (1-2, 3-4, 4+, No Scratch) appear as grouped options with dividers
Repair Rules UI: 'Then charge' dropdown shows Repair (Part Cost Only), Labor (Labor Cost Only), Both (Part + Labor), Inspect Further
Backend API: /api/repair-rules/available-questions returns sub_options_1 and sub_options_2
Pricing calculation: 'repair' action uses only part cost (Labor: ₹0 shown in UI)
Auto-repair detection in LiveProgressModal Repairs tab shows 40 items
Questions with sub_options: 46 questions found with Dent/Scratch options
